tree._: Concern clock. Tree block: depth IS temporal scale. Pscale 9 (year) at root, descending to pscale 1 (second). Digit at each depth = concern aspect at that scale. Nodes with 'last' are live — phase = (now - last) / period_at_depth. No period map: depth IS period. Every concern is a loop in some state. The _ text encodes behaviour. The spine routes to wake.1 activation instructions. The kernel walks this block to find what is ripe and to route stimuli.

1._: System coherence. The self-concern thread from season to second.

2._: Threshold review. Weekly loop checkpoint — assess whether sustained loops are productive.
Relational. External-facing concern thread — users, signals, other entities.

1._: Relationship cycles. Weekly pattern review across all counterparties.
Signal-response. Engaged response to something that arrived and needs present-tier attention.
User engagement. Human is present and communicating. Loop in listening state — fires immediately on input.

2._: Signal triage. External event accumulated — assess priority and route. Light tier, quick pass.

3._: Continuation. Resuming prior conversation or multi-instance project. Check purpose for where the previous instance left off.
